title: Sip in Style: Studio One Hair Design's Signature Drinks
body_text:
At Studio One Hair Design, we believe that every salon visit should be an experience, and that includes what's in your glass! One of the ways we like to pamper our guests is by offering signature drinks that change with the seasons, holidays, and whatever's trending. From sparkling mimosas to festive creations, our drinks add an extra touch of luxury to your salon visit. Here's a peek at some of our favorite sips that have become a staple at Studio One.

1. The Grinch Mimosa: A Christmas Delight

This crowd-pleaser combines champagne, Midori sour, and edible green glitter for holiday sparkle. The drink gets its signature green hue from the Midori, giving it a playful nod to everyone's favorite green holiday character. We top it off with a maraschino cherry for that extra pop of color. It's sweet, a little sour, and full of holiday cheer—just like the season itself.

2. Mango Lucky Charm: Saint Paddy's Day Special

This festive drink starts with champagne, a splash of blue curaçao, and a hint of mango juice, creating a delicious blend that's fruity, bubbly, and oh-so-refreshing. Edible green glitter adds a touch of sparkle, making it the perfect toast to luck and good times. The bright, vibrant colors capture the fun and energy of Saint Paddy's Day while delivering a taste that's anything but ordinary.

3. Cozy Bailey's Coffee: A Winter Warmer

Our Bailey's Coffee blends rich coffee with creamy Baileys Irish Cream for a deliciously indulgent treat. It's topped with a swirl of whipped cream and a dusting of cocoa powder to make every sip feel like a warm hug. Perfect for those chilly salon days when you just want to curl up with something comforting.

4. Pumpkin Foam Coffee: Fall in a Cup

This seasonal favorite starts with a rich espresso base, topped with a light, airy pumpkin-flavored foam that adds just the right touch of sweetness and spice. The foam is made with real pumpkin puree, cinnamon, and a hint of nutmeg, creating a cozy, autumnal drink that feels like a warm embrace.

5. Peppermint Hot Cocoa: A Winter Wonderland

This winter classic is made with rich, velvety hot chocolate, a hint of peppermint extract, and topped with whipped cream and crushed peppermint candies. It's the perfect drink to get you in the holiday spirit, offering a sweet, minty kick that's both nostalgic and indulgent. Whether you're taking a break between hair treatments or just enjoying the festive vibe, this drink is a must-try.

At Studio One Hair Design, we're all about creating memorable experiences, and our signature drinks are just one of the many ways we bring a little extra joy to your salon visit. From festive mimosas to warm winter drinks, our menu is constantly evolving to keep things fresh and exciting. So next time you're in the salon, be sure to try one of our latest creations—you never know what delicious surprise we might be serving up!

Cheers to great hair and even better drinks!
